description: American Express is a financial services company that offers card, payments, rewards, travel, and business products. Its developer program provides API access for selected American Express and partner-facing use cases through the American Express Developers portal.
summary: American Express exposes a developer portal for multiple APIs with shared auth patterns (client ID/secret, OAuth 2.0, HMAC, and sometimes mTLS), plus a known Resy MCP endpoint at `https://apigw.americanexpress.com/dining/v1/mcp`; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
